compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect behavioral testing standard and testing_mode classification
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new behavioral testing standard and testing_mode classification system.
**Why**: After implementation, CLAUDE.md, agent routing tables, and workflow docs need to reference the new shared standard and testing_mode field.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document the shared behavioral testing standard
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md to document the testing_mode field in implementation-plan output
- IN: Update any existing workflow docs that reference test-writing behavior
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the shared behavioral testing standard location and the testing_mode classification system
  ← Satisfies: All success criteria (documentation reflects the implemented changes)
- When this story is complete, existing workflow documentation accurately describes the updated test-writing behavior
  ← Satisfies: All success criteria (documentation reflects the implemented changes)

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test
